narrative: Iran-Oman transit negotiations and escalating Middle East tensions drive a geopolitical risk premium as WTI firmed toward $102.1 — gold lower -0.40% near $4,544; equities -1.24%; DXY -0.12%; VIX 19.2. USD/JPY holds at 158.91 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-off flows, though 25d RR at -1.73 signals strong downside hedging. GBP/USD IV at 11.0% vs HV30 7.2% shows an elevated 3.8pt VRP as markets price supply shock risks. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27.
